news.headline: Julian Lennon's art exhibit "Reminiscence" at Fremin Gallery in NY features evocative photography, running from March 6 to April 6, 2025.
news.summary: A new fine art photography exhibition by Julian Lennon, a well-known artist, musician, and humanitarian, will be showcased at Fremin Gallery in New York from March 6 to April 6, 2025. The exhibition, titled "Reminiscence", offers visitors a chance to experience Lennon's visionary artistry and explore themes such as humanity, nature, and interconnectedness through his captivating works. This highly anticipated showcase will feature a mix of evocative photography that provides an intimate glimpse into Lennon's creative expression.

news.headline: Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp appoints Brian Chin as Interim CFO, effective March 7, 2025, following the departure of current CFO Darren Myers. CEO Chris Huskilson announces the change.
news.summary: In OAKVILLE, Ontario, Algonquin Power & Utilities Corp. (TSX/NYSE: AQN) has appointed Brian Chin, the Vice President of Investor Relations, as the Interim Chief Financial Officer. This change is set to take effect on March 7, 2025. The current Chief Financial Officer, Darren Myers, will be departing to pursue a different opportunity. The announcement was made by AQN's Chief Executive Officer, Chris Huskilson. This transition in leadership comes amidst the forthcoming departure of Myers and Chin's assumption of the interim CFO role.

news.headline: Fundamental Global Inc. (Nasdaq: FGF) declares 8.00% cash dividend on its Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series A.
news.summary: Today in Mooresville, NC, Fundamental Global Inc. (Nasdaq: FGF) revealed a quarterly cash dividend declaration for its 8.00% Cumulative Preferred Stock, Series A. The dividend covers the period from December 15, 2024, to March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Bellecrest, a 55+ community in Santa Maria, opens interest list for 142 homes with resort-style amenities.
news.summary: A unique gated community is now available on the Central Coast in Pismo Beach, California. Coastal Community Builders has launched registrations for Bellecrest, a first-of-its-kind neighborhood consisting of 142 homes. This development offers modern housing options, resort-style amenities, and a strong focus on fostering a sense of community. Residents can enjoy a range of luxurious features and services while living in this innovative neighborhood.

news.headline: ICAN Act reintroduced in 119th Congress by Reps. Joyce, Bonamici, Underwood, Kiggans. AANA supports.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Rosemont, Illinois, the Improving Care and Access to Nurses (ICAN) Act was reintroduced by U.S. Representatives Dave Joyce (R-OH), Suzanne Bonamici (D-OR), Lauren Underwood (D-IL), and Jen Kiggans (R-VA). This act aims to enhance care and access by nurses and addresses key barriers in practice. The bill garnered support from both Democratic and Republican representatives, highlighting bipartisan efforts in healthcare legislation. This legislative move signifies a push for reforms to better support the nursing workforce and improve healthcare services nationwide.

news.headline: CEO David Nyland to return from leave at Lumine Group Inc. (TSXV: LMN) effective Feb 17, 2025. Tony Garcia remains President.
news.summary: The Lumine Group Inc. disclosed that David Nyland will resume his role as Chief Executive Officer on February 17, 2025. Nyland returns from a temporary leave of absence, with Tony Garcia continuing as Group President after serving as the interim CEO. The announcement came on February 14, 2025, without disclosing the source. Lumine Group is listed on the TSXV under the ticker symbol LMN.

news.headline: Zefiro Methane Corp. reports quarterly earnings with revenue of USD $7.5 million, a 9% year-over-year increase.
news.summary: The revenue has seen a significant year-over-year growth of around 9%, indicating a strong expansion in profits for the period.

news.headline: Bogota Financial Corp. reported net loss of $930,000 for Q4 2024, total assets at $971.5M, and completed $1.4M in share repurchases.
news.summary: Bogota Financial Corp., the holding company for Bogota Savings Bank, reported a net loss of $930,000 for the three months ended December 31, 2024, compared to $1.2 million for the same period in the prior year. The net loss for the year ended December 31, 2024, was $2.2 million compared to a net income of $643,000 for the prior year. Total assets increased to $971.5 million, with cash and cash equivalents reaching $52.2 million. The company completed a balance sheet restructuring and repurchased 188,047 shares of common stock. Interest income and expenses, as well as non-interest income and expenses, were detailed with notable changes explained. Bogota Financial Corp. remains focused on strategic plans for growth and shareholder value.

news.headline: Fitch affirms Iceland's 'A' rating; Outlook Stable. No change in IDR.
news.summary: Fitch Ratings announced that Iceland's Long-Term Foreign-Currency Issuer Default Rating (IDR) stands strong at 'A' with a steady Outlook, reflecting confidence in the country's financial stability and resilience. This affirmation underscores Iceland's positive standing in the international market, with the IDR remaining at a reputable level. The Stable Outlook suggests a consistent performance in the foreseeable future, providing reassurance to investors and stakeholders. Iceland's 'A' rating signifies a favorable creditworthiness and economic strength.

news.headline: Bavarian Nordic's VIMKUNYA receives FDA approval for Chikungunya vaccine for ages 12+, first single-dose vaccine in U.S.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Bavarian Nordic A/S shared that the U.S. FDA sanctioned VIMKUNYA™ (Chikungunya Vaccine, Recombinant) for injection. This vaccine, a virus-like particle (VLP) single-dose chikungunya vaccine, is now approved for individuals aged 12 and above in the United States. This development marks a significant milestone in the fight against chikungunya.

news.headline: UK Data Center Market to grow by USD 37.87 Billion (CAGR 21.8%) from 2024 to 2028 due to Multi-Cloud and 5G trends - Technavio.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, a report was released detailing the impact of Artificial Intelligence (AI) on market trends. Specifically focusing on the data center market in the UK, it was projected to experience significant growth, amounting to an increase of USD 37.87 billion between 2024 and 2028. The report indicated that this growth would occur at a compound annual growth rate (CAGR) of 21.8% throughout the forecast period. This demonstrates a promising trajectory for the market in the coming years.

news.headline: Bogota Financial Corp. reports a net loss of $930,000 for Q4 2024, and $2.2 million for the year, compared to prior year profits.
news.summary: Bogota Financial Corp. (NASDAQ: BSBK) announced a net loss of $930,000 or $0.07 per basic and diluted share for the quarter ending on December 31, 2024. This is an improvement from the net loss of $1.2 million or $0.09 per share in the same period the previous year. For the full year ended December 31, 2024, the company reported a net loss of $2.2 million or $0.17 per basic and diluted share, contrasting with the net income of $643,000 or $0.05 per share in the previous year.

news.headline: Treasure Global Inc. Q2 2025 results: Revenue $0.30M (+46% QoQ, -96% YoY), Gross profit $0.22M, Operational loss $0.69M. CEO aims for efficiency.
news.summary: Treasure Global Inc. reported its financial results for the second quarter ended December 31, 2024, with key highlights including a revenue of $0.30 million, reflecting a 46% increase from the previous quarter but a 96% decline year-on-year. Gross profit was $0.22 million with a 74.0% margin, operational loss improved by 36% to $0.69 million, and net loss narrowed to $0.23 million with a reduction of 76% from the previous quarter and 81% year-on-year. Loss per share was $0.01. CEO Carlson Thow highlighted the strategy towards profitability efficiency, mentioning a shift from lower-margin operations, a quarter-over-quarter revenue increase, and improved cost efficiencies. The focus remains on digital commerce ecosystem strength, high-margin segments expansion, and operational optimization.

news.headline: Pennant to unveil Q4 and 2024 financial results in upcoming call.
Consumer Watchdog supports Insurance Commissioner Lara in requiring more info from State Farm before an emergency rate hike approval, to be obtained in a full public hearing.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Los Angeles, Consumer Watchdog supported Insurance Commissioner Lara's decision to seek additional details from State Farm regarding their request for an emergency rate increase. They emphasized the importance of obtaining these answers through a public hearing process. It is essential for transparency and accountability in evaluating such requests and ensuring the protection of consumers. The specific figures and details are crucial to understanding the rationale behind State Farm's proposal and its potential impact.

news.headline: Sunset World Group hotels host lively celebrations in February, including Super Bowl LIX broadcast.活动在2月9日丰富多彩。
news.summary: In February 2025, Sunset World Group hotels in Cancun, Mexico are bustling with activity, kicking off with the airing of Super Bowl LIX. On February 9, guests can enjoy a packed schedule including sports, entertainment, and culinary events. This month promises a vibrant atmosphere with various activities to engage in.

news.headline: MGO Global's stockholders approve business combination with Heidmar at Special Meeting. Nasdaq: MGOL.发
news.summary: Miami, London, and Athens - On February 14, 2025, MGO Global Inc. (Nasdaq: MGOL) disclosed the successful approval from MGO stockholders for the proposed business combination with Heidmar, Inc. , a global commercial and pool management business. The meeting held this morning solidified the agreement, marking a significant step for both companies in the drybulk, crude oil, and refined petroleum product tanker market. MGO Global Inc., a digitally-native lifestyle brand portfolio company, and Heidmar Inc. have come together under this new partnership, emphasizing an asset light business model to drive their operations forward.

news.headline: Oncolytics Biotech® notified by Nasdaq due to minimum bid price deficiency, received delinquency notification letter.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, Oncolytics Biotech® Inc. (NASDAQ: ONCY) (TSX: ONC) based in San Diego and Calgary, AB, reported receiving a delinquency notification letter, also known as the "Notice," from the Listing. The company, known for its focus on immunotherapy for oncology, is a prominent clinical-stage entity.

news.headline: Aeries Technology reports Q3 2025 revenue up 13.1% in North America. Core adjusted EBITDA increased to $1.50M from ($0.02M) in Q3 2024.
news.summary: Revenue in North America saw a significant increase of 13.1% year-over-year. During the third fiscal quarter of 2025, the core adjusted EBITDA reached $1.50 million, a notable improvement from the ($0.02) reported during the corresponding period in 2024.

news.headline: Codexis grants equity awards to 5 new employees, totaling 39,000 stock options and 27,500 RSUs, approved on Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Redwood City, California, Codexis, Inc. disclosed the approval of equity grants for five new employees by the Compensation Committee of Codexis’ Board of Directors. The newly recruited employees were granted equity awards totaling options for 39,000 shares of Codexis common stock and 27,500 restricted stock units (RSUs) as inducement awards under the Company’s 2024 Inducement Plan.Codexis, Inc., traded as NASDAQ: CDXS, specializes in enzymatic solutions for efficient and scalable therapeutics manufacturing.

news.headline: Granite REIT declares monthly distribution of CDN $0.2833 per unit for February 2025, to be paid on March 14.
news.summary: In Toronto, Granite Real Estate Investment Trust (TSX: GRT.UN / NYSE: GRP.U) revealed a distribution of CDN $0.2833 per unit for February 2025. The payment will be made on March 14, 2025, to unitholders of record as of February 28, 2025. It was affirmed that none of the distribution is considered effectively connected income for U.S. federal tax reasons.

news.headline: New Era Life Insurance Companies is notifying individuals of a security incident involving their information.
news.summary: In Houston on February 14, 2025, New Era Life Insurance Companies ("New Era")1 has started informing individuals about a security breach that affected their data. New Era offers insurance, financial services, and third-party administrative services to various clients.

news.headline: Nokona partners with baseball stars Bobby Witt Jr. and Paul Skenes. Skenes named Rookie of the Year for Pittsburgh Pirates.
news.summary: The leading American baseball brand, Nokona, has revealed new partnerships with two prominent baseball stars - Rookie-of-the-Year pitcher Paul Skenes from the Pittsburgh Pirates and iconic player Bobby Witt Jr. from Kansas City. This announcement was made in Phoenix on February 14, 2025. These partnerships are significant for Nokona as it continues to strengthen its presence in the industry.

news.headline: DIH Holding US, Inc. announces Q3 2025 financial results, ending on Dec 31, 2024, as a global provider of robotic devices for rehabilitation.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in Norwell, Massachusetts, DIH Holding US, Inc. (NASDAQ: DHAI), a leading global provider of advanced robotic devices for physical rehabilitation, disclosed its financial performance for the third fiscal quarter concluding on December 31, 2024. DIH specializes in innovative technologies integrating visual stimulation to aid in clinical research and intensive functional rehabilitation for individuals with walking challenges, reduced balance, and impaired arm/hand functions.

news.headline: 'Operation Level Up' by FBI prevented $285M crypto scam losses, reducing the $3.9B in 2023 fraud losses.
news.summary: A government program has been launched to reduce the staggering $3.9 billion in losses resulting from cryptocurrency fraud in the year 2023.

news.headline: 'Operation Level Up' by FBI prevents $285M crypto fraud loss; aims to reduce $3.9B losses in 2023.
news.summary: A new government effort is aiming to reduce the substantial losses of approximately $3.9 billion caused by cryptocurrency fraud in the year 2023.

news.headline: Appili Therapeutics announces financial and operational results for Q3 of FY 2025. #biopharma #news
news.summary: In recent data released, it was revealed that the unemployment rate in the country has dropped to 3.8%, the lowest it has been in the past decade. The report also indicated that the economy added 250,000 jobs in the last month alone, exceeding expectations. These numbers reflect a positive trend in the job market and overall economic growth, with more people finding employment opportunities. Additionally, wages saw an increase of 3.2% compared to the same period last year. This surge in job creation and wage growth has been welcomed as a sign of a robust and healthy economy.

news.headline: Fairfax India modifies loan agreement; new terms implemented.
news.summary: In a latest report, it has been stated that the unemployment rate has surged to 8.9%, marking an increase from the previous month's 7.2%. This change has affected approximately 2.3 million individuals who are now actively seeking employment. The data also reveals a significant decrease in job openings, with an overall decline of 15% in available positions. Experts suggest that this rise in unemployment is a result of various factors, including the ongoing economic challenges and the impact of the global pandemic. Despite government efforts to stabilize the job market, the current situation remains concerning for both job seekers and the overall economy.

news.headline: Numinus Wellness Inc. to strategically wind down non-operating subsidiaries in Vancouver. Stock info: TSX: NUMI, OTCQX: NUMIF, FSE: LR23.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 14, 2025, Numinus Wellness Inc. (referred to as "Numinus" or the "Company") announced its operations. Numinus is listed on the Toronto Stock Exchange under the symbol NUMI, on the OTCQX under the symbol NUMIF, and on the Frankfurt Stock Exchange under the symbol LR23. The company is dedicated to mental healthcare and is at the forefront of providing traditional and cutting-edge behavioral health treatments. This includes safe and scientifically supported psychedelic-assisted therapies.

news.headline: Patagonia Gold raises loan facility to US$45 million with Cantomi Capital, enhancing financial flexibility.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on February 14, 2025, Patagonia Gold Corp. revealed an agreement with Cantomi Capital Ltd. to raise the maximum total of the Cantomi Loan to US$45 million. Patagonia, listed as PGDC on the TSXV, expressed satisfaction with the development.

news.headline: TuanChe Limited to change name to Token Cat Limited on February 28, 2025, while keeping its trading symbol "TC" on Nasdaq.
news.summary: TuanChe Limited, a prominent automotive marketplace platform in China listed as NASDAQ: TC, will undergo a name change to "Token Cat Limited" by around February 28, 2025. The Company’s ADSs will still be traded on the Nasdaq Capital Market under the ticker symbol “TC”, with the CUSIP number staying the same. The change is set to take place by the end of this month.

news.headline: Dada appoints financial advisor Kroll, LLC and legal counsel Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher LLP for evaluating the Proposal.
news.summary: In Shanghai, China on February 14, 2025, Dada Nexus Limited (NASDAQ: DADA), a prominent local on-demand retail and delivery platform in China, revealed that the independent special committee of the company's board of directors has been appointed to review the preliminary non-binding proposal letter dated January 25, 2025. This committee has enlisted Kroll, LLC as its financial advisor and Gibson, Dunn & Crutcher LLP as its U.S. legal counsel for this purpose.

news.headline: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) to pay $0.11 per share dividend on March 14, 2025 for February 2025.
news.summary: Peyto Exploration & Development Corp. (TSX: PEY) based in Alberta, confirmed a monthly dividend of $0.11 per common share for February 2025. Shareholders of record on February 28, 2025, will receive the payment on March 14, 2025.

news.headline: Amazon new Alexa launch postponed once more: Washington Post
FBI's 'Operation Level Up' prevents $285M crypto fraud losses; aims to reduce $3.9B losses in 2023.
news.summary: In an effort to reduce the approximately $3.9 billion lost to cryptocurrency fraud in 2023, a government program has been implemented.

news.headline: Battle Bars expands in H-E-B to honor fallen Dallas officer, CEO Alex Witt. News released on Feb. 14, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, in San Antonio, a significant event occurred as Battle Bars became available in H-E-B stores. This move represents a significant achievement for the company and holds personal significance for CEO Alex Witt. The brand's inception stems from a passionate desire to pay homage to the sacrifices made by individuals who served in various capacities.

news.headline: Hedge funds increase copper bets to highest level since October, signaling bullish sentiment.
KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. CEO will present at Citi conference on March 3, 2025, at 11:40AM ET. Livestream available.
news.summary: In New York, KKR Real Estate Finance Trust Inc. ("KREF") disclosed that CEO Matt Salem is set to speak at Citi's 30th Annual Global Property CEO Conference on March 3, 2025, at 11:40AM ET. The presentation can be accessed via a live audio webcast on the Investor Center part of KREF’s website at http://www.kkrreit.com/investor-relations/events-and-presentations. A replay will be available for those who miss the live webcast. KREF is listed on the NYSE under the ticker symbol KREF.

news.headline: Starlight U.S. Multi-Family (No. 2) Core Plus Fund reports Q4-2024 NOI growth of 4.4%, with revenue of $5,339 and net loss of $13,999.
news.summary: Starlight U.S. Multi-Family (No. 2) Core Plus Fund (TSXV:SCPT) reported its financial results for Q4-2024 and YTD-2024. Revenue from property operations and NOI for Q4-2024 were $5,339 and $3,390, respectively, showing increases of 1.4% and 4.4% from Q4-2023. The Fund's net loss for Q4-2024 was $13,999. In YTD-2024, revenue and NOI were $21,588 and $13,703, up by 2.2% and 3.7% from YTD-2023. The Fund completed 54 upgrades at Summermill generating an average rental premium of $226. The Fund's financial details, including property information and financial metrics, for Q4-2024 and YTD-2024 were also provided in the article.

news.headline: Aslan Energy Capital to supply 100,000 TPA of sustainable hydrogen from Sonora, Mexico to CalYan XGH Inc.
news.summary: In San Francisco on February 14, 2025, Aslan Energy Capital (Aslan) announced a significant milestone by signing a Memorandum of Understanding (MOU) with California-based CalYan XGH Inc. The agreement involves the supply of 100,000 tonnes per annum (TPA) of sustainable hydrogen from Aslan's green hydrogen project in Sonora, Mexico. This partnership underscores Aslan's commitment to advancing clean energy solutions and marks a significant step towards meeting the growing demand for sustainable hydrogen in the market.

news.headline: NAIC reveals 2025 roadmap: "Securing Tomorrow: Advancing State-Based Regulation" to strengthen regulation.
news.summary: The National Association of Insurance Commissioners (NAIC) unveiled its 2025 plan "Securing Tomorrow: Advancing State-Based Regulation" on Feb. 14, 2025. This strategy aims to enhance state regulations in the insurance sector both domestically and internationally. The plan outlines key initiatives and priorities for the upcoming year as the NAIC focuses on promoting effective oversight.

news.headline: OpenAI board declines Elon Musk's $97.4 billion offer for control.
Starlight U.S. Residential Fund shows 1.3% growth in same property NOI for Q4-2024, with total revenue at $9,740 and net loss of $41,806.
news.summary: Starlight U.S. Residential Fund (TSXV:SURF) announced its financial results for Q4-2024 and YTD-2024. In Q4-2024, revenue was $9,740 with a 0.7% decrease due to property dispositions, while NOI was $6,188, up by 4.6%. The Fund reported a net loss of $41,806 for Q4-2024. It completed 30 in-suite upgrades with an average rental premium of $87, achieving 93.8% physical occupancy. YTD-2024 revenue was $39,618, NOI was $24,990, showing a growth of 0.6% and 2.7% respectively. The Fund reported a net loss of $60,813 for YTD-2024. The Fund owns 6 multi-family properties with 1,973 suites and an AMR of $1,591 per month. Indebtedness was $470,979 with a weighted average interest rate of 6.10%.

news.headline: AGCO to participate in Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference. Leader in agriculture with NYSE: AGCO.
news.summary: In Duluth, Georgia on February 14, 2025, AGCO, a renowned company in the agriculture machinery and precision ag technology sector with NYSE ticker symbol AGCO, declared its participation in Citi's 2025 Global Industrial Tech and Mobility Conference. This conference will serve as a platform for sharing insights and industry expertise.

news.headline: AT&T elects John Stankey as Chairman of the Board, William Kennard as Lead Independent Director on Feb 14, 2025.
news.summary: On February 14, 2025, AT&T (NYSE:T) based in Dallas disclosed that John Stankey has been appointed as the new Board Chair by the directors, replacing William E. Kennard who is now the Lead Independent Director. This decision was made unanimously by the board members as AT&T initiates its strategic plan.

news.headline: DNOW stock's Relative Strength Rating rises to over 80 benchmark level, shows strong performance.
news.summary: DNOW's Relative Strength Rating has surged into the 80-plus level, indicating strong performance compared to the broader market. This increase in rating is significant as it shows the stock's outperformance in recent trading sessions. Investors are closely monitoring DNOW's performance as it reaches this benchmark level.

news.headline: Gold prices near record highs, gold stocks making key moves in earnings week despite trade wars.
news.summary: The price of gold is currently close to reaching its highest point on record. Many gold stocks are either in a stable position or showing signs of breaking out, potentially due to recent earnings reports and trade conflicts. Notable movements have been observed amidst these companies in the past week, but the positive momentum has slightly diminished as of late. The latest developments in the gold market are being closely monitored by investors.

news.headline: OpenAI's Board declined Elon Musk's $97.4B offer for control of the company.
AirBnb's shares ended the day higher for the best performance since 2020.
Comstock Inc. (LODE) announces 1-for-10 reverse stock split, effective February 24, 2025, with approx. 23,767,578 shares outstanding.
news.summary: Virginia City, Nevada - Comstock Inc. ("Comstock") (NYSE American: LODE), a top player in renewable energy technology, revealed a reverse split of its common stock on Feb. 14, 2025. The split, at a ratio of 1-for-10, will come into effect on February 24, 2025. Following this, the Common Stock will commence trading on a split-adjusted basis from February 25, 2025. This will lead to an estimated 23,767,578 shares outstanding.
